description_long: This is a two-story factory building with a flat roof, constructed primarily from tan-colored concrete or stucco panels. The facade features multiple small, rectangular windows with dark frames, and the building is equipped with a prominent rooftop antenna tower, satellite dish, and various mechanical installations such as vents and HVAC units. Metal railings and piping run along the roof edges and sides, adding to the industrial character. The structure sits on a simple rectangular base, and the roof is divided into two levels, with the higher section supporting the antenna mast. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over form.
description: A tan, two-story industrial factory building with a flat roof, rooftop antenna, and visible mechanical equipment. The exterior features small windows, metal railings, and industrial piping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with several small windows, a central door, rooftop antenna, and satellite dish.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's depth, rooftop equipment, and the satellite dish on the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall, rooftop machinery, and metal railings along the lower roof section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible piping, rooftop antenna, and a satellite dish on the right edge.
